title: UniformLoadSetRecord
description: UniformLoadSetRecord: Definition of a single uniform load in the gravity direction (-Z), to be added to a UniformLoadSet.

Name.description: Description of the source of this load, such as: 'Partitions', 'Occupancy', or 'MEP & Ceiling'

Load.description: The magnitude of this load, generally to be applied as an AreaUniformLoad in the gravity direction (-Z) Property has a quantity of type Pressure meassured in [Pa].

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
